title: Kenyan Flatbread
description: A simple Kenyan-style flatbread recipe using common ingredients. Serve warm or toasted for a delicious side dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine Kenyan and smoky.
Gradually add water while stirring with a wooden spoon until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal portions, depending on desired flatbread size.
Roll out each portion into a thin circle, about 6-8 inches in diameter.
Brush the surface of each flatbread with oils.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
Cook each flatbread for 1-2 minutes on each side, until golden brown and puffed.
Serve warm or toasted with your favorite toppings.
